**Selected: (A) Confirm — target user authenticates via Claude subscription OAuth; JSONL tail is treated as local file I/O on the user's own machine; pivot proceeds as seeded.**

Implication for architecture: no `@anthropic-ai/*` package may be imported by loom on the default path. The Agent SDK code path is removed after cutover (subject to a separate decision on quarantine-vs-delete). API-key auth is not a parallel default in this iteration. The JSONL tail bridge reads `~/.claude/projects/<encoded-cwd>/<sessionId>.jsonl` as user-data on local disk, with the same legal posture as a git tool reading `.git/` or htop reading `/proc`.
